config-client-visual-enabled-comment: Enable or disable the client-side vegetation wind adjustment inside enabled authoritative room types.
config-greenhouse-wind-mode-comment: Choose NoWind or VanillaLowWind. VanillaLowWind preserves each plant's original Vanilla wind mode and uses the independent wind range configured for the plant's managed room type.
config-apply-greenhouses-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside Vanilla-classified greenhouses.
config-apply-cellars-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside enclosed small rooms that use Vanilla's cellar-size classification.
config-apply-rooms-comment: Apply the selected plant movement mode to vegetation inside other enclosed RoomRegistry rooms.
config-apply-crops-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to crop blocks.
config-apply-flowers-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to flower blocks.
config-apply-herbs-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to herb blocks.
config-apply-berry-bushes-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to small berry bushes and fruiting berry bushes.
config-apply-tall-plants-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to cattails, tule, papyrus, sedges, and other tall plants or reeds.
config-apply-vines-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to wild vines and vine blocks.
config-apply-fruit-tree-leaves-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to wind-enabled foliage vertices on fruit tree branch and foliage blocks.
config-restart-required: Restart Required: Configuration changes take effect after restarting the client.
config-apply-other-vegetation-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to other BlockPlant, plant-material, and leaves-material vegetation whose rendered mesh contains active Vanilla wind vertices. This includes ferns and compatible modded plants without hardcoded block names.
config-apply-grass-comment: Apply indoor wind adjustment to ground-cover grasses (tallgrass and *-grass-* blocks), which do not share the block types or materials of other vegetation.
config-apply-water-comment: Calm the surface motion of water source blocks inside enabled room types, using that room type's wind range. Set the range to 0% for still water. Only rooms already tracked for vegetation are affected.
config-greenhouse-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled greenhouses. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind.
config-greenhouse-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled greenhouses. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range.
config-cellar-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled cellars. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind.
config-cellar-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled cellars. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range.
config-room-wind-lower-comment: Lower simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Set equal to the upper value for fixed wind.
config-room-wind-upper-comment: Upper simulated Vanilla surface-wind percentage shared by all enabled normal RoomRegistry rooms. Unequal bounds step upward and downward through the range.
